response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to event-driven systems and AI-agent tooling, but lacks demonstrable leadership in scaling AI-native fintech systems, managing regulatory-compliant AI operations, or leading teams beyond 10 engineers — critical gaps for a CTO role in high-stakes fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Proven experience with event-driven architectures and real-time systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Hands-on contribution to AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Strong engineering culture advocacy (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source leadership)
concerns: No clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems in production fintech or regulated environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams beyond ~10 people or building executive-level technical leadership layers
Minimal mention of financial systems, credit risk, working capital, or compliance infrastructure — core to the role
